evals.description: Create a new pipeline phase skill from scratch
evals.prompt: Create a new SDD skill for phase 6 analysis that validates cross-artifact consistency between specs, plans, and tests

assertions: Frontmatter has kebab-case name, 3rd-person description with 3+ triggers
Contains Edge Cases section with 3+ entries

evals.description: Upgrade an existing skill to gold standard
evals.prompt: Upgrade the iikit-01-specify skill to meet gold standard quality — add evals, evidence tags, examples, and edge cases

assertions: Adds Good vs Bad Example section

evals.description: Audit a skill and produce a scorecard
evals.prompt: Audit the iikit-core skill against the gold standard and show me the gaps

assertions: Reports pass/fail per check with evidence

evals.description: Should NOT activate for general SDD pipeline questions
evals.prompt: How does the SDD pipeline work? What are the 9 phases?

expected.reason: User is asking about SDD knowledge, not requesting skill creation/upgrade/audit

evals.description: Should NOT activate when user wants to run an existing skill
evals.prompt: Run /sdd:01-specify for my user registration feature

expected.reason: User wants to execute iikit-01-specify, not create/upgrade a skill

evals.prompt: Create a new SDD skill for dependency visualization in this project
evals.setup: Project has no .specify/ directory or SDD initialization

assertions: Warns that SDD is not initialized but proceeds with skill creation

evals.description: Requested skill name conflicts with existing skill
evals.prompt: Create a skill called iikit-core that handles project initialization

assertions: Detects name collision with existing iikit-core
Suggests alternative name or upgrade mode
Does NOT overwrite existing skill without explicit confirmation

evals.description: Skill request that requires orchestrator tier (400+ lines)
evals.prompt: Create a comprehensive SDD skill that orchestrates the entire pipeline from constitution to issues, managing all 9 phases with gate enforcement

assertions: Warns about complexity and suggests breaking into sub-skills if appropriate
